title: Order Details
goal: The goal is to increase repeat purchases by providing quick access to previous orders. Additionally, we aim to improve user satisfaction by offering a simple and efficient experience.
description: The new feature enables users to easily reorder any previous order with just one click. From the My Account section, users can view their order history. When selecting a specific order, they will find a button to quickly reorder that purchase. This enhancement streamlines the shopping experience and saves time for our returning customers.
